title: Technology Consulting Discovery Questionnaire
description: Structured questionnaire for technology consulting engagements covering infrastructure, applications, security, and strategic planning.

sections.title: Current Technology Environment
sections.description: Understanding the existing technology stack, infrastructure, and architecture.

sections.title: Business Processes & Workflows
sections.description: How technology supports day-to-day business operations.

sections.title: Pain Points & Challenges
sections.description: Current frustrations, bottlenecks, and technology debt.

sections.title: Security & Compliance
sections.description: Security posture, regulatory requirements, and data governance.

sections.title: Budget & Resources
sections.description: Technology budget, team capabilities, and resource constraints.

sections.title: Strategic Goals & Roadmap
sections.description: Vision for technology transformation and success criteria.

questions.text: What are the primary technology platforms and systems your organization relies on today?
How would you describe your current infrastructure? (On-premises, cloud, hybrid)

followUpLogic.Primarily on-premises: Are there plans to migrate to the cloud?

questions.text: Which systems are considered mission-critical, and what are their approximate ages?
What are the top 3 business processes most dependent on technology?
How integrated are your key systems? Do they share data automatically or require manual transfer?
What are your biggest technology frustrations right now?
Are there any systems or processes that cause frequent downtime or errors?
What regulatory or compliance frameworks does your organization need to adhere to?
How do you currently handle data backup and disaster recovery?
What is the approximate annual technology budget range?
How large is the internal IT team, and do you use external contractors or MSPs?
What does your ideal technology landscape look like in 2-3 years?
What would you consider a successful outcome from this technology transformation?
